case_title: TOWN & COUNTRY PRODUCTS, INC DBA ROOMS UNLIMITED VS MAK, TIMOTHY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOWN & COUNTRY PRODUCTS, INC DBA ROOMS UNLIMITED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MAK, TIMOTHY GIDDINGS CONSTRUCTION, CA LIC #668462 IS CURRENTLY UNDER SUSPENSION PER THE CA CONTRACTORS STATE LICENSE BOARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY MAK, TIMOTHY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TOWN & COUNTRY PRODUCTS, INC DBA ROOMS UNLIMITED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-03-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-07-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY TOWN & COUNTRY PRODUCTS, INC DBA ROOMS UNLIMITED AS TO DEFENDANT MAK, TIMOTHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO TIMOTHY MAK RETURNED SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MAK, TIMOTHY RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT TOWN & COUNTRY PRODUCTS, INC DBA ROOMS UNLIMITED $3,275.95 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,297.95, CROSS-DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. CONCURRENTLY WITH THE PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT THE CONTRACT BETWEEN CROSS-COMPLAINANT AND CROSS-DEFENDANT IS RECINDED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
